The '''''Straasa''''' was an [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
It was scheduled to be repaired at [[Depot XLS]] in the [[Fondor system/Legends|Fondor system]], but was attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] intending to destroy all the capital ships while they were at their weakest condition.

==Behind the scenes==
Whether or not ''Straasa'' gets destroyed depends on the player's actions.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
